801 N Walnut St, Olathe, KS 66061, USA

This site is apart of the KC giving Grove: https://www.givinggrove.org/volunteer

Located in North Walnut Park, the fruit tree orchard was planted in the fall of 2015. When in production, the trees will provide fresh fruit for residents in the immediate area
